fields.name: Analysis Area
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the application area of the analysis column template. The options are:
Sales: The analysis column template was set up for Sales & Receivables
Purchase: The analysis column template was set up for Purchases & Payables
Inventory: The analysis column template was set up for Inventory

fields.name: Analysis Column Template
fields.tooltip:
Contains the name of the analysis column template that this column is part of.
The program automatically retrieves the name from the Name field in the Analysis Column Template table.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the line number for the analysis column.
The program fills in the field automatically and uses the number to keep track of all the analysis columns that are defined in the table.

fields.name: Column No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a number for the column in the analysis view.

fields.name: Column Header
fields.tooltip: Specifies a header for the column as you want it to appear on printed reports.

fields.name: Column Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the analysis column type, which determines how the amounts in the column are calculated.

fields.name: Ledger Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of ledger entries that will be included in the amounts in the analysis column.

fields.name: Formula
fields.tooltip: Specifies a formula for how data is shown in the column when the analysis report is printed.

fields.name: Comparison Date Formula
fields.tooltip: Specifies a date formula that specifies which dates should be used to calculate the amount in this column.

fields.name: Show Opposite Sign
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want purchases and positive adjustments to be shown as negative amounts and sales and negative adjustments to be shown as positive amounts.

fields.name: Show
fields.tooltip: Specifies when you want the amounts in the column to be shown in reports.

fields.name: Rounding Factor
fields.tooltip: Specifies a rounding factor for the amounts in the column.

fields.name: Comparison Period Formula
fields.tooltip: Specifies a period formula that specifies the accounting periods you want to use to calculate the amount in this column.

fields.name: Analysis Type Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the analysis type to apply to the column.

fields.name: Item Ledger Entry Type Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the filter that applies to the item ledger entry type that you want this column to be calculated from.

fields.name: Value Entry Type Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the filter that applies to the item value entry type that you want this column to be calculated from.

fields.name: Value Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source data that the source data type in the Analysis Type Code field, in the Analysis Columns window, is based on.

fields.name: Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want the analysis report to be based on invoiced amounts. If left field blank, the report will be based on expected amounts.
